title: Session 1 Intro
readAloud:
Welcome to The Bean Rounders.

Three of you. One agreement. Journey to Chult, chasing rumours of an ancient idol buried in jungle ruins that the maps stopped marking a hundred years ago.

For weeks you have travelled aboard the Sea's Fury, a weather-beaten merchant vessel carrying cargo, crew, passengers and at least a few secrets across open ocean.

The plan was simple. Reach port. Eat proper food. Sleep in real beds. Hire a guide. Head inland and get rich.

The last port never happened.

A pirate blockade forced the Sea's Fury to sail on. Fresh food ran out days ago. Water is rationed by the cup. The crew are short-tempered and the passengers are hungrier. Everyone aboard is desperate to see land.

Captain Thorne swears Chult is close. Survive the night, and you make port by mid-morning.

Unfortunately, the storm has other ideas.

The Sea's Fury groans beneath your feet. Black waves rise higher than the rails. Rain comes in sideways. Lanterns swing wild arcs of light across the deck. Ropes crack tight like whips. The air tastes of salt, wet wood and fear.

Somewhere beyond the darkness lies Chult.

Somewhere beneath you, the sea is waiting.

A wave the size of a house rises off the port bow. Sailors are screaming for hands.

You are hungry. You are exhausted. And the storm does not care.

Where are each of you on this ship, right now, and what are you doing about it?
